storyInfo: Momoka makes contact with Kichisei and Hoshiguma with the help of Sarasa, an employee of Kinseki Station who detests Mifune. Moriuchi finds the Kami that he has been seeking for many years, though the reunion does not go as expected.

attributes.content: Hoshiguma! Hoshiguma! Can you hear me?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Can you hear—
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Quit yappin'!
attributes.name: Lazy Yakuza

attributes.content: Hoshi—
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: You know what, yap all you want, we'll give that aho a warm welcome!
attributes.name: Lazy Yakuza

attributes.content: What does Kinbee want with me?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Kinbee? Who's that?
attributes.name: Lazy Yakuza

attributes.content: I mean, Mifune.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: How am I supposed to know? You're an idol, so maybe the oyabun has some use for you. Or maybe he just plans to do you in.
attributes.name: Lazy Yakuza

attributes.content: Should've buttered him up more with that pretty face of yours. I don't know what you're thinking.
attributes.name: Lazy Yakuza

attributes.content: Bakayaro, who the heck's texting me? Everyone knows I got assigned last-minute guard duty—
attributes.name: Lazy Yakuza

attributes.content: What? Some other unlucky sod's taking over the shift?
attributes.name: Lazy Yakuza

attributes.content: Ya—hoo!
attributes.name: Lazy Yakuza

attributes.content: He's gone.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: What happened? Why did I feel like I was hearing voices... even talking to Hoshiguma?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Am I going crazy?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Behind—you—
Eek!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Pfft!
So you weren't acting in those shows. I didn't believe it when Kichisei told me.
You know Kichisei? Is she alright?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Locked up, like you, but probably safe for now.
Wh-Who are you?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: You can call me Sarasa. I'm a fan of yours, and I guess you could say I'm Mifune's employee, but my true identity is an undercover cyber ninja!
Cyber... ninja? How's that different from a regular ninja?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Look, ninja are nothing more than hired killers. But the cyber kind? We're wanderers of the intercity net!
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: But I thought cyber ninja were pretty much the same, hired by corporations to attack each other, just specializing in intercity net operations?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Fine, I'm a cyber ronin ninja!
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: But I don't know where you came from, or why you're helping me—
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: That video that you saw at home, the one where Mifune and Mio plot to infect you with Oripathy? I was the one who leaked it to warn you! Do you trust me now?
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: You were the one who gave me that fright in the middle of the night?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Well, it was the first time I worked on a Mitsukue—I mean, the Kinseki Channel signal system. It was a mistake. I didn't do it on purpose, I promise!
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: A-Alright... well, I guess I do owe you my life...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Honestly, I only applied to Kinseki Channel because I heard it was the biggest TV station in Mitsukue, and I needed a job.
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: But the longer I worked, the more things began to stink. But at least they had you as their poster girl... but they wouldn't even keep their hands off you!
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Especially that Mifune. I would've just kept my head down and did the work I was paid for, if he wasn't so yabai.
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: But I'd rather jump into the sea than work another day for that piece of shit.
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: ...Hehe.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I located Hoshiguma using Mifune's monitoring network, so I patched you in briefly.
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: You can do that? I remember how the technical director spent a long time fumbling with a pre-set connection the last time I was live on air...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: That just means he sucks at his job.
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Now, listen to me. I'll patch you in with Hoshiguma again, and have her wait outside.
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: We'll take Kichisei. Listen to me, and I'll make sure those stupid yakuza never even catch a glimpse of your shadow.
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: No, I can't go.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Are you crazy? Do you WANT Mifune to cut you up into burdenbeast feed?
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Where can I go, if I leave?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: The Southern Court's a big place. Plenty of places you can go.
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Lay low the rest of my life, always looking over my shoulder? No way.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I didn't give myself the name Momoka Hanyuu, but if you tell me I have to give it up now...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: How's that any different from being dead?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Are you serious? Aren't you afraid to die? Do you have a death wish or something?
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: I don't know. All I know is that it's the only path I have left.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Fine. You know what, that sounded really cool, like a line straight out of a movie. You're a star for a reason!
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: How do you plan on continuing to be a star, then? What if Kinbee won't let you?
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Whoever stands in my way... they're gonna find out that even I can bite when backed into a corner.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Didn't Kinbee make up all those kaidan stories? I'll tell all Mitsukue that they've been lied to.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Interesting.
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Can you connect me to every TV set in Mitsukue? I'm going to expose Kinbee to the entire city.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: How long do you think it's gonna take, hacking all those TVs, one at a time?
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: But they're doing that accession ceremony and broadcasting it to the whole city. All we need to do is take a ride on it.
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: You still have that broken sword? It'll come in useful.
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: The first thing that Kinbee's people did when they captured us was take it from me...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: But I'll say it, with or without the evidence.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Good.
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: I'll get that Kichisei girl, and Ao-Oni on the other side of the TV, and then we can talk about how we'll teach Mifune a lesson!
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Where are you?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Where are... you...?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Did I doze off?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Wait, did the kami-sama...?!
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: I'm not in that much of a hurry.
It's you?!
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Moriuchi sits straight with a start.
He wants to turn around, but dares not, afraid that he will learn that it is all a dream, and there is nothing there at all.
The kami seems satisfied with this reaction.
Kami-sama...
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: It... it's been a long time.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: You're finally willing to show yourself to me.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: I'm very grateful that you pulled my family out of poverty.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Did you spend all these years looking for me, just to say thank you?
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: I wanted to thank you, of course, but there was also something I wanted to ask.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Why... why did you leave us? Why was it that we lost our happy life, little by little, until it was all gone?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Did we offend you? Or was it fate that not even you could avert... and that was why you chose to avoid us?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: What does any of that have to do with me?
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: I-I understand, of course it couldn't be...
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: What I mean is, did you spend all these years looking for me just to learn the reason?
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: Were you not looking for me because you wanted to seize happiness again?
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: I've said this many times, but I guess you were too young to remember, so I'll be patient and tell you once more.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: I never give anyone anything.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: Think of it this way: there's something I like, and I appear in front of people when I see it.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: Something... do you mean, happiness?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: I didn't avoid you because I was angry at you, or ashamed to see you. I simply chose not to see you because happiness had left you.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: But now, I have a reason to see you again.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: Choose the right path, and you shall know happiness beyond your wildest dreams.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: The kami's voice is exactly as he remembers, but for some reason it makes the hair on the back of his neck stand up. Is it because he has lost the innocence of childhood?
Is it because he has heard too many lies in his time?
Yes. He has heard too many lies, and he has learned to treat all beautiful promises as deception.
But this is different.
Please... tell me.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: You stand in the eye of the storm.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: The Oni, Hoshiguma; the snake, Kinbee. Add to that a poor goldfin, and a wolf who believes its own nose—you. All your fates are intertwined.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: Oh, there was also an unfortunate old man, but he's dead now.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: Tessai-san?!
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: With his death, you finally have the chance to seize the happiness that you have longed for.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: His death... my happiness? What do you mean?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Why... why is Tessai dead? Who killed him?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Is it so hard to guess?
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: What you REALLY should ask yourself, though, is if it matters?
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: You stand where countless people could only dream of standing, Moriuchi. This is a business opportunity, a big one. Choose right, and everything will be yours.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: You want me... to stand on Kinbee's side?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Kinbee is a liar. He wouldn't let me live.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: That's why it's a big business opportunity.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: Kinbee is a liar, certainly, but he needs you. More specifically, Kinsekikai needs you.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: The separation of the Kinsekikai and the Kinseki Group has entered the final phase. Only a catastrophic event could stop it.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: Everything seems to be going according to Kinbee's plan, but he's about to find that he isn't as powerful as he thought.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: You've survived for so long between the overworld and underworld of Kajimachi and Nita Street. As a man, you're not that far off from Kinbee.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: Moriuchi is stunned.
In his mind, he fantasied about his reunion with the Kami countless times, but never in another thousand years could he have imagined that It would so calmly tell him something so...
...Terrifying.
You want me to take Kinbee's place? Is that the happiness that you're talking about?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: What if I take his place, but find it beyond my abilities...?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: But you'll be rich. Very rich.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: Rich...?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: You'll be rich, whether you have the ability or not. Maybe not as rich as Kinbee is... but the kind of wealth that you could hardly even imagine right now.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: Is money not happiness?
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: Was it not money that you and your family found when you were young?
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: Is it not because of money that Mitsukue, and this country, enjoy endless happiness?
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: Where would happiness be if money left you?
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: ...Is this the lesson you have for me?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: It's not a lesson, just the simplest law of existence.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: Kinbee knows it. The Diet knows it. Virtually everyone in Mitsukue knows it... you knew it too, when you were little.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: Moriuchi feels a chill come over him, as though the setting sun is suffocating in its own golden rays.
Is this really the Kami that he encountered when he was young?
Or is this simply an absurd nightmare... no, something trying to deceive him and make him abandon his search for the kami?
But Its mannerisms, the way It talks, even the line 'What does any of that have to do with me?'... he has never forgotten them.
In Moriuchi's memory, even those cold words seemed to be a kind of encouragement. Now, though...
Moriuchi is gasping for air, but the cold nightmare seems inexorably suffocating.
He reaches into his pocket and takes out the key.
There are numerous scratches on the old-fashioned key, with a tiny maneki-neko hanging from the keychain.
It has kept him company for many years.
Money is happiness, you say?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Maybe. Maybe that's what I always thought, deep inside.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: But did you ever stop to think... before all that happened, I only ever thought of you as a friend, the only friend of a lonely boy?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: The friend brought me happiness, for which I was very grateful, but could never repay. You had no intention to accept everything that I did.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: When you disappeared after I failed to come to see you for a while, I thought it must be because I had neglected you.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: I thought I deserved it, because I had abandoned my only friend.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: You know? I almost did the exact same thing when I was being coerced by Mifune.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: The Oni?
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: Yes. My guts wrenched in shame when she came to rescue me, but I couldn't say anything.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: But you just told me that I got it backwards all along. It wasn't you who brought me happiness. You simply came to me because happiness was there.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: I see. You're a kami... you've never been any more or less than a kami.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: I'm sorry for my arrogance, to think that I could befriend a kami, never mind trying to catch its tail.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Thank you for coming to see me, and telling me that I have been walking down the wrong path my entire life.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: How could an information broker have any true friends?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Moriuchi raises the keys and takes off the maneki-neko accessory.
He looks at the keychain, as though he is talking to the kami behind it.
But I wanted a friend. A true friend.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Can you understand that? Would it make you... angry?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: If you're not angry... might I be so presumptuous as to... make a bet with you?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Moriuchi stretches out his hand, into the sky unobstructed by concrete.
If I do as you say...
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: I'll never have a true friend for the rest of my life...
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: I'll never have true happiness.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: He bites his lip and opens up his trembling hand.
The accessory falls straight down, like any ordinary object, and is soon swallowed by the dark streets beneath the setting sun.
...Sayounara.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Where are you going?
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: To find Hoshiguma. If Tessai's dead, as you said, then I have to go and help Hoshiguma.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: She's in the back alley of Nita Street. The one with that tiny shrine.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Huh... huh?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: What are you huhing for? It's me?
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Maneki-Neko-sama, It—
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Moriuchi turns around to see nothing, as though nothing was there to begin with, except for the orange-yellow glow of dusk.
He turns his head to the front, and sees the Nosy Kami floating in the air in front.
That neko left because you rejected It. Does that surprise you?
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Then... why did you help me?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: It's not me who wanted to help you. The star of our shrine told me to help you if I have time, for all the chikuwa offerings you made.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: That neko could've done it Itself! Hmph!
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Thank you for the help, and pass on my thanks to that... er... 'star'?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Don't expect me to help you fight. I'm just pointing the way.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: After all, both of us have a score to settle with that bastard Mifune.
attributes.name: Nosy Kami

attributes.content: Moriuchi-san?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Did you come to help me, or stop me?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Help.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Did you find your kami-sama, then?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It's doing fine. Much better than I am. But It has nothing to do with me, now that I've found It.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Where's Momoka? Isn't she with you?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: I was about to go in and rescue her—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Moriuchi? Is that Moriuchi?
attributes.name: Voice on TV

attributes.content: The TV?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Moriuchi-san! Momoka told me your oden's the best in Higashi! I want to try it, once this is all over and done with.
attributes.name: Voice on TV

attributes.content: Who are you?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Call me Sarasa, but we don't have time for introductions right now!
attributes.name: Voice on TV

attributes.content: Momoka, Kichisei, get closer to the mic! Time to make battle plans!
attributes.name: Voice on TV

attributes.content: Mitsukue's in for a BIG surprise!
attributes.name: Voice on TV
